description: Product description For men with class. Axe Musk gives you a self-confident elegance that is timeless and resists fast-moving trends. The fragrance combines the tangy, refreshing tones of lime and lavender and finds its perfection with the tart timbre of musk, amber and precious woods. Enjoy its magical effect on sensual women. Aluminium free. Delivery contents: 6 x Axe deodorant body sprays, each 150 ml, musk. Directions Refer to general body deodorant usage guidelines for spray deodorants.
